category_sources: source_facts.description says low-level cryptographic library; official Nettle manual at https://www.lysator.liu.se/~nisse/nettle/nettle.html describes the Nettle low-level cryptographic library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nettle; official homepage https://www.lysator.liu.se/~nisse/nettle uses Nettle.
docs_sources: Official Nettle manual hosted on the project maintainer homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control repository URL was identified, while source_facts.source-archive points to the official GNU release tarball.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official homepage, and official manual describe a low-level cryptographic library with hash and crypto primitives.
